art_style: soft storybook watercolour, luminous deep-sea blues and teals, gentle rounded edges, dappled sunlight filtering through water, cozy and kawaii sea creatures, no text
dedication: For every little explorer who wonders beneath the waves — the ocean is yours to discover.

pages.subject: blue whale
pages.text:
The great blue whale is gentle and wide,
the largest of all on the deep ocean tide.
pages.scene: A single enormous blue whale gliding through deep blue open ocean, shown in full from the side: a very long, smooth, streamlined body tapering from a broad rounded head to a slender tail with a wide horizontal fluke, small narrow flippers, a tiny dorsal fin set far back, and the long pleated grooves along its underside. Mottled blue-grey skin catching soft beams of filtered sunlight. The face is sweet and friendly with one soft, gentle eye and a calm gentle smile. Vast empty blue water all around, no other creatures, no people, no words.

pages.subject: dolphins
pages.text:
The dolphins leap high, then dive with a splash,
they play in the waves and away they dash.
pages.scene: A pod of sleek bottlenose dolphins arcing and leaping over sparkling blue waves, painted sky and rolling sea filling the whole frame edge to edge. Each dolphin has a true dolphin shape: a long streamlined torpedo body, a curved dorsal fin, a pointed beak-like snout, smooth grey backs and pale bellies, and a horizontal tail fluke. Sunlit spray and white foam on the wave crests, a warm soft sky above. Faces are sweet and friendly with gentle eyes and happy smiles. No people, no words.

pages.subject: green sea turtle
pages.text:
The green sea turtle paddles with ease,
sailing the reef on the warm blue seas.
pages.scene: A green sea turtle swimming over a sunlit coral reef, seen from the side and slightly above: a broad smooth oval shell patterned with golden-green scutes, four long flat flipper-paddles spread wide like wings, a small rounded head on a gentle neck, and scaly skin. Beams of sunlight ripple across colourful corals below in blues, pinks and oranges. The face is sweet and friendly with soft gentle eyes and a gentle smile. One clear subject, no people, no words.

pages.subject: harbor seal pup
pages.text:
The fluffy seal pup basks in the sun,
on a smooth ocean rock, when its playing is done.
pages.scene: A single fluffy harbor seal pup resting on a smooth rounded ocean rock at the edge of calm blue water. A plump but true seal shape: a rounded body tapering to small back flippers, short front flippers tucked at its sides, a round whiskered face with big dark soft eyes and a gentle smile. Soft speckled silvery-grey fur, slightly damp and fluffy. Calm blue sea and a soft sky behind. No people, no extra animals, no words.

pages.subject: penguins
pages.text:
The penguins stand close on the cold white ice,
their warm cozy feathers feel snuggly and nice.
pages.scene: A family of penguins standing together on smooth white ice beside the cold blue sea. Upright rounded bodies with black backs, white fronts, small flipper-wings at their sides, orange beaks and orange webbed feet, waddling stance. A mix of larger adults and a fluffy grey chick. Sweet friendly faces with soft gentle eyes and gentle smiles. Pale icy blue water and a soft cold sky behind. No people, no words.

pages.subject: clownfish
pages.text:
The bright little clownfish bobs in and out,
its anemone home keeps it safe, with no doubt.
pages.scene: A little orange clownfish peeking out from a large swaying sea anemone, with a colourful coral reef filling the whole underwater scene. The clownfish has its true shape: a small rounded oval body with bright orange colour, three white bands edged in black, and small fins. The anemone's soft pink-and-purple tentacles sway around it. Corals in blue, green, yellow and coral-pink fill the background. The fish's face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle smile. No people, no words.

pages.subject: blue tang
pages.text:
The bright blue tang glides by in the light,
its shimmering colours are sparkly and bright.
pages.scene: A bright blue tang fish gliding through clear sunlit blue water. Its true shape: a flat, rounded, disc-like body, vivid royal-blue with a bold black marking and a sunny yellow tail and yellow fin edges, small pointed snout and thin flowing fins. Sunbeams shimmer through the clear blue water around it. The face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle smile. One clear subject, no people, no words.

pages.subject: shark
pages.text:
The friendly shark swims with a fin standing tall,
so calm and so smooth, he glides through it all.
pages.scene: A friendly shark cruising through clear blue water, shown in full from the side: a long, sleek, streamlined grey body with a pale belly, a tall pointed triangular dorsal fin standing up on its back, pointed pectoral fins, gill slits, and a large upright vertical tail fin with the top lobe taller than the bottom (a true shark tail, NOT a horizontal dolphin fluke). The face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle, closed smile. Clear sunlit blue water all around, no other creatures, no people, no words.

pages.subject: swordfish
pages.text:
The swordfish swims fast with a long sword-like bill,
slicing the water, it never stays still.
pages.scene: A friendly swordfish gliding swiftly through the deep open blue ocean, shown in full from the side: a long, sleek, muscular silvery-blue body, a very long pointed flat sword-like bill extending from its snout, a tall curved dorsal fin, slender pointed pectoral fins, and a stiff crescent tail. A real streamlined billfish shape, long and fast. The face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle smile. Deep blue water with soft light beams, no people, no words.

pages.subject: sea otter
pages.text:
The sea otter floats on its back in the sun,
rolling and bobbing, the day's full of fun.
pages.scene: A single sea otter floating on its back in calm blue water, seen from the side and above: a long furry body lying belly-up at the surface, little webbed back feet, and small front paws held together on its chest. Dense brown fur, slightly wet and fluffy, with a round whiskered face. Sweet and friendly with big soft gentle eyes and a gentle smile. Gentle ripples and soft sparkles on the calm blue water around it. No people, no words.

pages.subject: orca
pages.text:
The orca glides by in its black and white coat,
strong and so smooth as it swims, like a boat.
pages.scene: A single orca swimming through deep blue ocean water, shown in full from the side: a large, smooth, powerful streamlined body, glossy black on top and crisp white below with a white eye patch, a tall straight dorsal fin standing up on its back, rounded paddle-shaped pectoral fins, and a horizontal tail fluke. The face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle smile. Deep blue water with soft light from above, no other creatures, no people, no words.

pages.subject: narwhal
pages.text:
The narwhal glides under the cold arctic sea,
with one long spiral tusk, as proud as can be.
pages.scene: A pale, softly-spotted narwhal swimming through cool blue water, its long rounded body roughly level. From the very FRONT of its face, right at the tip of its snout, extends ONE single long, slender, gently spiralled TUSK — a long pointed tooth — reaching far out ahead in front of the narwhal and tapering to a fine point, leading the way forward like a thin lance held out in front of its face. The tusk is long and thin (not a short stub) and grows straight out from the front tip of the snout, low on the face near the mouth. The richly painted underwater scene fills the whole frame edge to edge, no white or pale border.

pages.subject: pufferfish
pages.text:
The round pufferfish drifts where the seaweed sways,
puffing up round in such funny ways.
pages.scene: A single round pufferfish puffed up into a ball, its round body EVENLY covered all over with SHORT, uniform little pointy spines sticking out neatly in every direction — an even, tidy, all-over spiny ball with the spines short and evenly spaced (absolutely NOT long, NOT clumped, NOT messy, NOT fanned out to one side), sandy-tan with little spots, small fanning side fins, a tiny beaky mouth and big round gentle eyes, drifting in clear sunlit blue water with a few soft green seaweed strands. ONLY the single pufferfish is in the picture — absolutely no other animals, no other fish, no birds, no ducks and nothing else floating in the background. The face is sweet and friendly with a gentle smile. The painted scene fills the whole frame edge to edge.

pages.subject: walrus
pages.text:
The walrus rests calm on the cold smooth ice,
with long ivory tusks, he looks rather nice.
pages.scene: A single walrus resting on smooth ice at the edge of the sea. A true walrus shape: a big, heavy, wrinkled brown body, two long ivory tusks pointing down from its whiskered muzzle, a broad bristly snout, small eyes, and flat flippers. Calm cold blue sea behind the ice. The face is sweet and friendly with soft gentle eyes and a gentle smile. No people, no extra animals, no words.

pages.subject: jellyfish
pages.text:
The jellyfish glows as it drifts through the deep,
a soft little light that it loves to keep.
pages.scene: A single glowing jellyfish drifting through deep blue water: a soft, translucent, dome-shaped bell glowing gently in pink, blue and violet, with long delicate trailing tentacles and frilly oral arms flowing beneath it. A soft luminous glow lights the dark blue water around it. A simple sweet, friendly feel with a soft gentle look and a gentle calm. One clear subject, no people, no words.

pages.subject: sea lion
pages.text:
The sea lion rests on a rock by the sea,
basking in sunshine, as happy as can be.
pages.scene: A single sea lion resting on a smooth rock beside the calm blue sea, propped up on its front flippers: a sleek, sturdy tan-brown body, long fore-flippers, a doglike whiskered face with small external ear flaps, and a smooth coat. Calm blue water and soft sky behind. The face is sweet and friendly with big soft gentle eyes and a gentle smile. No people, no extra animals, no words.

pages.subject: octopus
pages.text:
The octopus curls with its eight bendy arms,
exploring the rocks with its wiggly charms.
pages.scene: A curious octopus among the rocks on the ocean floor, shown clearly with exactly eight curling tentacle arms (count: eight) spreading and curling around the rocks, lined with little suckers underneath. A soft rounded bulb-shaped head-body in warm reddish-orange, able to change colour, with two big expressive eyes. The face is sweet and friendly with soft gentle eyes and a gentle smile. Rocky seabed and clear blue water around it, no people, no words.

pages.subject: angelfish
pages.text:
The tall angelfish drifts with fins flowing wide,
bright stripes all aglow as it sways with the tide.
pages.scene: A bright striped angelfish gliding through a sunlit coral reef. Its true shape: a tall, flat, disc-like body standing high and thin, with long trailing flowing fins above and below and a delicate tail. Bold bright stripes in yellow, blue and white along its body. Sunbeams ripple over colourful corals in the background. The face is sweet and friendly with a soft gentle eye and a gentle smile. One clear subject, no people, no words.

pages.subject: manatee
pages.text:
The gentle grey manatee floats by the grass,
with one round flat paddle, so slow as they pass.
pages.scene: A gentle grey manatee with a friendly whiskered face and two small front flippers, and ONE single solid rounded spatula-shaped paddle tail — a smooth flat rounded fan exactly like a beaver's tail or a ping-pong paddle, one continuous un-split fin with a single smooth rounded edge, absolutely NOT a forked, notched, split, pointed, two-lobed or whale-fluke tail — floating slowly and peacefully through calm clear shallow blue water with soft green seagrass on the sandy bottom below, the painted scene filling the whole frame edge to edge.

pages.subject: starfish
pages.text:
The starfish has five little arms in a row,
resting in pools where the warm waters go.
pages.scene: A classic five-pointed starfish resting in a sparkling tide pool, shown clearly from above with exactly five arms (count: five) spreading out evenly in a star shape. A bumpy textured surface in warm orange and coral-pink, with rows of tiny tube feet hinted beneath. Clear shallow water sparkles around it over smooth wet pebbles. A sweet, friendly feel with a gentle calm look. One clear subject, no people, no words.

closing:
The deep blue world is a wonderful home,
where all of these creatures can swim, splash, and roam!
